questions.question:
Answer with the option letter only. Which column style do the visible columns or pilasters on the façade in the image most closely resemble?
A. Doric
B. Ionic
C. Corinthian
D. Gothic
What visible component matches this description: the central mythological male figure?
questions.rgb_answer: The central mythological male figure is the one in the middle of the façade, standing on a pedestal and holding what appears to be a spear or staff. He is surrounded by other figures that seem to be interacting with him, suggesting a scene from classical mythology. This central figure is part of the sculptural group that adorns the base of the building's façade.

gt_answers.Small: The central mythological male figure is a statue.

rendered_selected.reason: The image shows a large statue of a male figure in the center, which matches the description.
